texto: How do I recognize a real saint? Whom I shall see within me whether it is in dreams or trances or meditations, He will be the Saint to me. Because God is the only Saint in this world. He is within our bodies. When He will manifest within my body in the form of a person, he will be saint to me.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jibankrishna que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “How do I recognize a real saint? Whom I shall see within me whether it is in dreams or trances or…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, dream, god, com foco em god e meditation.

texto: After attainment of Supreme knowledge a man lives but he does not lead an ordinary man’s life. He lives, he eats, he sleeps and by God’s commandment he becomes a ‘man-catcher’ as Christ told Peter.
explicacao: Citação de Jibankrishna sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “After attainment of Supreme knowledge a man lives but he does not lead an ordinary man’s life. He…” articula sabedoria, christ, god em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como god e knowledge.

texto: God out of His own will expresses and manifests Himself in the human body and not to be obtained by self-exertion. The question may rise what others will do? The answer is the life of Jesus and Sri Ramkrishna. Others will lead their lives according to the instructions as given to them by their own lives. - Sri Jibankrishna (Diamond)
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jibankrishna que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “God out of His own will expresses and manifests Himself in the human body and not to be obtained …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, body, god, com foco em god e human.
